given.description: QA gate blocks when codex_review_result.json has unresolved HIGH finding. Dev produces actual_file by running pipeline.py check --phase qa under the T001 fixture and capturing { qa_blocked, block_reason } from the gate output.

when.command: pipeline.py check --phase qa with normal_review_gate fixture (unresolved HIGH CR-001 finding present)

given.description: preflight verifies ruff rule existence. Dev invokes pipeline.py preflight requesting ruff rule PLW0621 (non-existent) and writes only the { ruff_rules_not_found, ruff_rules_verified } subset of preflight_report.json into actual_file.

When all changed files are non-trust-root, gates batch-ci classifies the pipeline as batched. Dev runs pipeline.py gates batch-ci --probe with changed_files=[ic_part_src/order_mapper.py] and writes { is_trust_root, ci_mode } into actual_file.

when.command: pipeline.py gates batch-ci --probe with changed_files containing only non-trust-root paths

given.description: When any changed file matches TRUST_ROOT_PATTERNS, gates batch-ci must keep per_phase CI. Dev runs pipeline.py gates batch-ci --probe with changed_files=[pipeline.py, CLAUDE.md] and writes { is_trust_root, ci_mode } into actual_file.

when.command: pipeline.py gates batch-ci --probe with changed_files containing trust-root paths

given.description: Agent MD sync — qa-agent.md gains Round-trip Gate and Codex Review Gate sections.

when.check: QA reads .claude/agents/qa-agent.md after MT-4 dev module pass.

given.description: CLAUDE.md update — new 11-step flow names Preflight, Codex Review Gate, batched CI, deferred build.

when.check: QA reads CLAUDE.md after MT-5 dev module pass.

given.description: pm_planner retry limit. After 2 prior failed pm_planner agent runs, pipeline.py agent start --phase pm_planner must block.

preflight_report.json schema sanity. Dev runs pipeline.py preflight on a probe pipeline_id and writes a schema summary {schema_version, has_related_files, has_tool_facts, has_writer_reader_pairs, has_build_required} derived from the produced preflight_report.json into actual_file.

when.command: pipeline.py preflight on probe pipeline_id IMP-PROBE-0001
